key_finding: Phi-3.5-mini REPLICATES intermediate value decodability: V_R=0.884-0.938 at '=' (Qwen was 0.907-0.949). V|text=0.785-0.855, V_eq>>V_prompt (gap +0.36 to +0.61), V>K at 4/4 layers, forward-looking V at -5 R=0.830. All z>28, p<0.001. SURPRISE: per-operation breakdown only works for multiplication (V_R=0.86-0.93), not add/sub/div (possible PCA artifact). 7/8 TRUE, 0/5 FALSE.
evidence_impact: ESTABLISHES intermediate value decodability on 2 model families (GQA/digital/base + MHA/analog/instruct). Core computation finding is architecture-independent. V>K at computation positions is cross-model. Operation-type universality inconclusive.
next_planned: Global PCA + per-operation probing to resolve operation-type artifact question
